reviews.comment:
Buena atención tenes una especie de placita donde puedes descansar con sombra natural y el bar excelente

(Translated by Google)
Good service, you have a kind of small square where you can rest with natural shade and the bar is excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURseVktanFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mal servicio.. solo te cobran en efectivo no te ofrecen otro medio de pago.  Ademas de tener todas las cosas mas caras hasta un 200%  las bebidas calientes... no la verdad todo muy caro y con muy mala predisposición de atencion.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service... they only accept cash and don't offer any other payment methods. Plus, everything is overpriced, even hot drinks, sometimes by up to 200%... honestly, everything is very expensive and the customer service is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsdzlQNzdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros re buena onda, lastima que hay solo dos surtidores así que hay que hacer cola para cargar....YPF....agrégale surtidores a los muchachos......el full también esta muy bien atendido.

(Translated by Google)
The attendants are really friendly, it's a shame there are only two pumps so you have to queue to fill up....YPF....add more pumps for the guys......the full station is also very well run.

Excelente atención todo bien limpio tanto baños como el full nada de que quejarse. Muy bien 10 pts.

Excellent service, everything very clean, both bathrooms and the staff, nothing to complain about. Very good, 10 points.

reviews.comment:
BUEN PUNTO PARA HASER UNA PARADA , SUS INSTALACIONES SON LINDA, SUS BAÑOS LIMPIOS,  TIENES EL HOTEL AL LADO EL MISMO MUY CONFORTABLE,,PERO MUY CARO TODO LO QUE SE COMERCIALISA EN SU BAR

(Translated by Google)
Good spot to stop, the facilities are nice, the bathrooms are clean, and there's a very comfortable hotel next door, but everything sold in the bar is very expensive.
